instruction: Before making the call on Dublin, check the latest meeting email note, the forecast, and today's Europe/Dublin calendar. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send support@example.com the async update.
canonical_instruction: The latest meeting email note, the forecast, and today's Europe/Dublin calendar don't line up cleanly for Dublin. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send support@example.com the async update.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Dublin contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-13
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-06 --cron '30 16 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Dublin daily contradiction check'
